name: New Year's Day
desc: Tortimer wishes you a happy new year and hands over a random diary.

name: Igloo Campers
desc: A camper sets up an igloo in town through winter. Visit to chat, play a matching game, and you may be able to invite them to move in.

name: Tortimer's Lighthouse Request
desc: Tortimer heads off on vacation and asks you to light the lighthouse each night between 6 and 10 PM for a week. Do it every night and he returns with a lighthouse model.

name: Groundhog Day
desc: Villagers gather at the wishing well awaiting Resetti, then Tortimer gives a flower model.

name: Tortimer's Lighthouse Request
desc: Tortimer takes a second vacation and again asks you to light the lighthouse nightly for a week. Keep it lit every night and he rewards you with chocolates.

name: Valentine's Day
desc: Villagers send letters with gifts to your mailbox.

name: Spring Sports Fair: Aerobics
desc: The Sports Fair opens with morning aerobics by the wishing well. Take part in any event to earn Tortimer's spring medal.

name: Spring Sports Fair: Footrace
desc: The late-morning footrace around the wishing well. Take part in any event to earn Tortimer's spring medal.

name: Spring Sports Fair: Ball Toss
desc: The afternoon ball-toss contest at the wishing well. Take part in any event to earn Tortimer's spring medal.

name: Spring Sports Fair: Tug-o'-War
desc: The day closes with tug-o'-war by the wishing well. Take part in any event to earn Tortimer's spring medal.

name: April Fools' Day
desc: Special characters prank you. Tortimer gives the joke game Super Tortimer.

name: Cherry Blossom Festival
desc: Every fruit tree blooms pink. Tortimer gives a pink tree model.

name: Nature Day
desc: Tortimer shares nature advice and gives a tree model.

name: Spring Cleaning Day
desc: Villagers ask if you've been tidying. Tortimer gives a dump model.

name: Mother's Day
desc: Tortimer gives a lovely phone near the wishing well.

name: Graduation Day
desc: Tortimer presents the Tailor Model for your hard work.

name: Father's Day
desc: Dad writes a letter; Tortimer gives a locomotive model.

name: Fishing Tourney
desc: Chip hosts a bass-only fishing competition; top catch wins a fishing trophy.

name: Hometown Day
desc: Your town's anniversary, set to a random date when your save file was created. Tortimer gives a train station model matching your station.

name: Fireworks Show
desc: Tortimer roams a random acre and gives a decorative bottle rocket.

name: Tent Campers
desc: On summer weekends a camper pitches a tent in town. Visit to chat and you may be able to invite them to move in.

name: Group Stretching
desc: Copper leads morning aerobics at the wishing well.

name: Meteor Shower
desc: Watch meteors reflected in the lake; Tortimer gives a telescope.

name: Founder's Day
desc: Tortimer tells the town's founding story and gives a weed model.

name: Labor Day
desc: Tortimer gives a shop model at the wishing well.

name: Autumn Moon
desc: View the moon's reflection in the lake; Tortimer gives the moon furniture item.

name: Fall Sports Fair: Aerobics
desc: The autumn Sports Fair opens with morning aerobics by the wishing well. Take part in any event to earn Tortimer's autumn medal.

name: Fall Sports Fair: Footrace
desc: The late-morning footrace around the wishing well. Take part in any event to earn Tortimer's autumn medal.

name: Fall Sports Fair: Ball Toss
desc: The afternoon ball-toss contest at the wishing well. Take part in any event to earn Tortimer's autumn medal.

name: Fall Sports Fair: Tug-o'-War
desc: The day closes with tug-o'-war by the wishing well. Take part in any event to earn Tortimer's autumn medal.

name: Explorer's Day
desc: Find Tortimer outside town hall for a bottled ship.

name: Mushrooming Season
desc: Five mushrooms appear near random trees around town each morning. One mushroom disappears every 15 minutes, meaning all mushrooms will disappear by 9:00 AM.

name: Halloween
desc: Tortimer dresses as Jack, who roams a random acre looking for candy.

name: Mayor's Day
note: Day after the 1st Monday of November
desc: Tortimer gives a Well Model at the wishing well.

name: Officer's Day
desc: The town honors Booker and Copper; Tortimer gives a police model.

name: Fishing Tourney
desc: Chip hosts a bass-only fishing competition; top catch wins a fishing trophy.

name: Harvest Festival
desc: Three tables of food at the well; Tortimer gives a cornucopia.

name: Sale Day
desc: Nook sells Grab Bags and Redd appears; Tortimer gives a market model.

name: Snow Day
desc: Tortimer marks the start of winter with a Snowman furniture item.

name: Toy Day
desc: Tortimer hands out a present at the wishing well — a miniature car for boys, a doll for girls.

name: Jingle Comes to Town
desc: Jingle the reindeer roams town on Christmas Eve. Talk to him to receive furniture from the Jingle series.

name: Countdown
desc: Villagers gather at the pond; Tortimer gives a noisemaker before midnight.

name: K.K. Slider Visits
desc: K.K. Slider performs outside the train station on Saturday nights. Request a song to receive a bootleg recording you can play at home.

name: Raffle
desc: Exchange five of the month's raffle tickets at Tom Nook's store for a chance to win one of three prizes.
